title: osmia odorata
intro: Osmia odorata, also known as sweet goldenrod, is a perennial plant in the aster family, native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. Osmia odorata can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
